name: Unusual Network Activity Detected
description: Un high volume of outbound network connections to external IP addresses has been detected, potentially indicating data exfiltration or malicious command and control activity.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the network activity event.

parameters.name: src_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address of the outbound connections.

parameters.name: dest_ip
parameters.description: The external destination IP address of the connections.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The total number of outbound connections detected.

parameters.name: bytes
parameters.description: The total bytes transferred during the activity.

parameters.name: packets
parameters.description: The total packets transferred during the activity.
